reviews.review_description: The journey really made me contemplate my life in a way that I haven't before. It was very peaceful and meditative and allowed me a safe space to explore all the moments of my life, good and bad. The near death experience was really cool, not scary at all. In the end I felt like I had a new lease on life and it made me think about how I want to move forward with more gratitude and intention.

A truly unique experience that puts you into a beautiful world, full of colorful and mesmerizing visuals.  I found the journey very peaceful, meditative, and easy to engage with.  I highly recommend to anyone looking for a great all around VR experience.

I appreciate the creativity of this app—it’s truly unique and has a way of touching the soul. However, the experience could be even more impactful with improved graphics. I gave 4 stars instead of 5 because the flying and descending speeds are too fast, which can cause motion sickness for some users, including me. On some occasions, I had to close my eyes to avoid discomfort, which would disrupt the experience.

If the developers plan to create more content like this, I’d highly recommend that they make the movements smoother and slower. Aside from this issue, I’m really enjoying the app!

I wasn’t sure what to expect, but the experience really surpassed all my expectations! This journey really helps put life into perspective and creates an excitement for what the future can hold. Highly recommended.

I have seen this app advertised a lot on Facebook pre-release and was excited for it. It was a nice journey but it was fairly short and doesn’t have any replay value to me. I also 
thought the graphics could be better
